title: Playbooks
description: A user's running life-event playbook instances with steps wired to LIVE FinOS figures (read by reference, never computed here) and the provenance of any tasks/goals generated from steps. Provided by Module 13 (Workspace) to Tasks (Module 7), Goals (Spine), and Focus (Module 9). Recommend-only: Workspace never moves money and never writes a goal balance — generated items are PROPOSALS materialized downstream. Money: any cached figure is integer minor units (cents) typed exactly as its upstream contract; Workspace performs no monetary arithmetic. Every externally-sourced figure carries a FreshnessStamp (Constitution VIII).

profile_id.description: Owning profile; scoped server-side from the session identity, never a client-supplied id (platform-decisions §5).

freshness.description: Freshness of this published projection; individual live step figures carry their own per-figure freshness.

template_id.description: Curated, versioned playbook template this instance was created from.

template_version.description: Semver of the template dataset; a step-schema change is caught by contract tests (FR-X-011).

event_kind.description: Canada-specific life event (FR-WS-001). Extensible by adding curated templates without code change.

title_fr.description: Bilingual — single-language chrome is a defect (Constitution II).

started_at.description: UTC; rendered to the user's locale at the edge.

step_id.description: Stable step id within the template; part of the generation provenance key.

state.description: overridden = held by a higher-precedence signal (e.g. SafeToActSignal conflict; ux §4.4).

live_bindings.description: LIVE figures this step references from upstream contracts. Values are cached for render only and governed by Fresh-or-Flagged; Workspace computes none of them.

generated.description: Tasks/goals proposed by this step, with provenance + downstream reference once materialized. Idempotent (FR-WS-001).

proposes_money_action.description: true iff this step proposes a money action; such a step MUST carry reasoning and route confirmation through the Confirm-Action sheet (FR-X-003/006).

reasoning.description: Required when proposes_money_action=true: the referenced inputs + bilingual rationale (Constitution VI).

safe_to_act_deferred.description: true iff Cash Safety's SafeToActSignal overrode a spend-implying step; Cash Safety always takes precedence (umbrella conflict edge case).

target_contract.description: The upstream contract $id the figure is read from (e.g. 'finos:cashsafety/RunwayForecast/1.0.0').

value_path.description: JSON path of the referenced figure within the upstream object (e.g. 'runway_days', 'goals[goal_id].current_amount').

resolution_state.description: withheld = stale MONEY figure withheld (Constitution VIII); unavailable = target deleted/revoked/version-skewed. Never 'live' for a stale money figure.

cached_amount_cents.description: Last-known amount in integer minor units, typed exactly as upstream; render-only, never re-rounded or summed here. null for non-money or unavailable figures.

cached_rate.description: Last-known rate/fraction (e.g. utilization) as a decimal string; render-only. null when not a rate.

goal_ref.description: Optional link to a GoalState goal for time-to-goal context (FR-X-004).

freshness.description: Inherited from the owning contract; stale money ⇒ resolution_state withheld.

provenance_id.description: Stable idempotency key = hash of {playbook_instance_id, step_id, generation_kind}. UNIQUE — a replay never double-creates (Constitution IV).

materialization_state.description: pending until the downstream module/goal-service materializes it; the idempotency key holds across the wait.

downstream_task_id.description: Set once Tasks (Module 7) materializes a generation_kind=task proposal.

downstream_goal_id.description: Set once the Spine goal service materializes a generation_kind=goal proposal. Workspace never writes the goal's money balance.
